title: equisetum ramosissimum var. annuliferum
intro: Equisetum ramosissimum var. annuliferum, also known as Chinese horse tail or Chinese horsetail, is a plant species belonging to the Equisetaceae family and is considered a vascular plant that reproduces via spores. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Equisetum ramosissimum var. annuliferum include its potential to improve kidney function, reduce blood sugar levels, and support bone health due to its high silica content. Equisetum ramosissimum var. annuliferum can be prepared as an herbal tea, powder, or supplement, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
